# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-operator
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
    - name: istio-ingress
      enabled: true
    egressGateways:
    - name: istio-egress
      enabled: true
    sidecarInjector:
      enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
        enableAutoInjection: true
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
        logLevel: "warning"
        statsEnabled: true
        statsd:
          enabled: true
      security:
        enableMtls: true
        mtls:
          enabled: true
  meshConfig:
    accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
    outboundTrafficPolicy:
      mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
    proxyMetadata:
      PROXY_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
    enableTracing: true
    rootNamespace: istio-system
    trustDomain: "cluster.local"
    enablePrometheus: true
    enableStats: true
    enableAccessLog: true
    defaultConfig:
      proxyMetadata:
        PROXY_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
      accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
      logLevel: "warning"
      statsEnabled: true
      tracing:
        provider: "zipkin"
    serviceGraph:
      enabled: true
    serviceMesh:
      enabled: true
  meshNetworks:
    network1:
      endpoints:
      - fromRegistry: "cluster.local"
      gateways:
      - name: istio-egressgateway
        namespace: istio-system
      services:
      - name: "*"
        namespace: "*"
        ports:
        - 15000
        - 80
        - 443
      - name: "istio-ingressgateway"
        namespace: istio-system
        ports:
        - 15000
        - 80
        - 443
